Variables.Name: AvoidanceGroup_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: DEPRECATED: Group mask for this agent - use property from CharacterMovementComponent instead

Variables.Name: GroupsToAvoid_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: DEPRECATED: Will avoid other agents if they are in one of specified groups - use property from CharacterMovementComponent instead

Variables.Name: GroupsToIgnore_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: DEPRECATED: Will NOT avoid other agents if they are in one of specified groups, higher priority than GroupsToAvoid - use property from CharacterMovementComponent instead

Functions.Name: SuspendCrowdSteering
Functions.Description: master switch for crowd steering & avoidance
